full_content:
Slice 4 smart-poller retirement: archive smart poller in favor of cross-harness event-driven trigger

Owner directive 2026-05-09 (S337/S339 mitigate+land) authorizes Slice 4 retirement of the smart poller (Windows scheduled task GTKB-SmartBridgePoller, VBS daemon, runner, install/uninstall scripts) in favor of the cross-harness event-driven trigger (scripts/cross_harness_bridge_trigger.py registered as PostToolUse + Stop hooks in .claude/settings.json and .codex/hooks.json). The retirement preserves the dispatch-on-actionable-change semantic byte-identically while removing the interval-driven substrate. ADR-SMART-POLLER-OWNER-OUT-OF-LOOP-001 v2, DCL-SMART-POLLER-AUTO-TRIGGER-001 v2, DCL-SPAWNED-HARNESS-ROLE-DEFER-DURABLE-RECORD-001 v2, and PB-INCIDENT-S321-DAEMON-DISPATCH-DISABLED-001 v2 are mechanism-agnostic supersessions of the smart-poller-specific predecessors.

DECISION: retire the GT-KB smart poller (Slice 4) in favor of the cross-harness event-driven trigger.

OWNER AUTHORIZATION:
- 2026-05-09 (S337) AskUserQuestion: "Mitigate now, then land Slice 4 (Recommended)" -- owner authorized stopping PID 18616 + disabling GTKB-SmartBridgePoller + landing the Slice 4 retirement.
- 2026-05-09 (S339) re-affirmation: per-AUQ approval of D5/D5c artifact mutations (3 narrative-artifact authority edits, 5 MemBase v2 supersessions including this NEW DELIB).

ARTIFACTS RETIRED (archived to archive/smart-poller-2026-05-09/):
- Windows scheduled task GTKB-SmartBridgePoller (deleted via schtasks /Delete /F).
- scripts/run_smart_bridge_poller.vbs
- scripts/run_smart_bridge_poller.ps1
- scripts/install_smart_poller_task.ps1
- scripts/uninstall_smart_poller_task.ps1
- groundtruth-kb/scripts/bridge_poller_runner.py
- groundtruth-kb/tests/test_bridge_poller_runner.py
- scripts/bridge_notify_reader.py
- groundtruth-kb/tests/test_doctor_smart_poller.py

REPLACEMENT: scripts/cross_harness_bridge_trigger.py registered as PostToolUse + Stop hooks in .claude/settings.json and .codex/hooks.json. Doctor checks _check_cross_harness_trigger and _check_bridge_dispatch_liveness replace _check_smart_bridge_poller (removed) and the smart-poller-specific dispatch-state probe.

INVARIANT PRESERVED: actionable-signature scheme is byte-identical between substrates per tests/scripts/test_cross_harness_bridge_trigger.py:test_dispatch_state_schema_matches_smart_poller_signature_scheme; the trigger reuses the same dispatch-state.json path; per-recipient updated_at semantics are unchanged.

V2 SUPERSESSIONS LANDED IN THIS SLICE:
- ADR-SMART-POLLER-OWNER-OUT-OF-LOOP-001 v2: mechanism-agnostic owner-out-of-loop dispatch decision.
- DCL-SMART-POLLER-AUTO-TRIGGER-001 v2: mechanism-agnostic auto-trigger contract with 5 assertions retargeted to cross-harness-trigger and doctor tests.
- DCL-SPAWNED-HARNESS-ROLE-DEFER-DURABLE-RECORD-001 v2: dispatch-prompt durable-role-deferral, current implementation pointer to scripts/cross_harness_bridge_trigger.py.
- PB-INCIDENT-S321-DAEMON-DISPATCH-DISABLED-001 v2: historical incident preserved; lessons reframed for cross-harness-trigger doctor detectors; new A1 assertion.

PRESERVED UNCHANGED: PB-INCIDENT-S321-PROPOSAL-WITHOUT-SPEC-LINKAGE-001 (mechanism-agnostic by design).

BRIDGE THREAD: gtkb-bridge-poller-event-driven-replacement-slice-4-smart-poller-retirement-001 (REVISED-7 at -015, GO at -016 by Codex; -017 post-impl report to follow).

PRIOR DELIBERATIONS:
- DELIB-S319-SMART-POLLER-POLICY-CLARIFICATION (smart-poller was opt-out while functional)
- DELIB-S319-SMART-POLLER-OBJECTIVE-CLARIFICATION (spawn-to-notify architecture)
- DELIB-S321-SMART-POLLER-AUTO-TRIGGER (S321 owner directive)
- DELIB-S337-CODEX-HOOKS-WINDOWS-RETEST-2026-05-08 (event-driven trigger empirical foundation)
- DELIB-S337-CODEX-HOOK-PARITY-STANCE-REFRESH-2026-05-08 (Codex hooks live on Windows for >= 0.128.0-alpha.1)

REJECTED ALTERNATIVES (during S321-S337 lead-up):
- Keep smart poller and add event-driven trigger as redundant safety net: rejected (two dispatch substrates risk double-spawning and signature contention; one canonical mechanism is cleaner).
- Cosmetic env-var rename GTKB_BRIDGE_POLLER_RUN_ID -> GTKB_BRIDGE_TRIGGER_RUN_ID: deferred to Open Follow-On 6 (out of Slice 4 scope; pure cosmetic).
- Hard-archive bridge/* library modules: deferred (modules retained for adopter compatibility; D5i adds RETIRED-preamble docstrings instead).

CONSEQUENCES:
- Bridge dispatch is now event-driven (PostToolUse + Stop hooks) rather than interval-driven (15-second poller scan).
- Owner-out-of-loop semantic preserved: trigger fires on tool-use and Stop, not on owner prompt.
- Doctor surface is mechanism-correct (smart-poller checks removed; cross-harness-trigger + dispatch-liveness checks added).
- Adopter projects scaffolded post-Slice-4 receive the cross-harness trigger by default; legacy bridge-os-poller-setup-prompt.md template is retained as a DEPRECATED stub for two release cycles (per Open Follow-On 7).
explicit_change_request: Approve as drafted (D5c item 5 AskUserQuestion answer 2026-05-09): user selected 'Approve as drafted' for the NEW DELIB-S337-SMART-POLLER-RETIREMENT-2026-05-09. Captures owner authorization (S337/S339), 9 artifacts retired, cross-harness-trigger replacement, byte-identical signature-scheme invariant, all 4 v2 supersessions, prior deliberations, rejected alternatives, consequences.
change_reason: Slice 4 D5c item 5 (NEW DELIB): consolidated retirement-decision record. Authority: bridge gtkb-bridge-poller-event-driven-replacement-slice-4-smart-poller-retirement-001 GO at -016.
